title: Azure AI Foundry connection service
description: Service-level configuration for a host: azure.ai.connection entry. The service key is the connection name. azd updates or creates the connection on the project the entry depends on.

target.description: Target endpoint URL or ARM resource ID. May contain ${VAR}; declare each referenced variable in the service-level env object.

credentials.description: Credentials. Values may contain ${VAR} declared in the service-level env object or ${{...}} for Foundry server-side resolution.
